summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs conservatively. All are open maintainer-owned draft PRs with focused code changes, hydrated ClawSweeper/Codex review comments, no security-sensitive signal, and no low-signal cleanup policy enabled. The job disables merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout, so no mutating close/merge/fix actions are planned.

actions.reason: Keep open as related focused maintainer-owned draft work; no shared canonical should be invented for this live inventory shard.
Keep open as related provider-discovery guard work; no canonical or duplicate relationship is safe to assign in this inventory shard.
Keep open as related provider-policy guard work; the linked merged PR is a different provider-policy issue and does not justify fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Keep open as related plugin metadata guard work; it needs maintainer/rebase handling, not inventory closeout.
Keep open as related metadata-isolation work; validation and maintainer review remain outside this non-mutating inventory shard.
